summary: Iteration 5 testing complete for Apna Counselor major update. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). All new features verified: Purple theme (#7C3AED), NO mock data (only admin + 70 colleges seeded), Razorpay Payment Links API (creates real rzp.io URLs), NEET removed from predictor and skill filters, mentor/counsellor registration working.
